[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101001010 4
1 000110101 4
2 010010011 4
3 010100011 4
4 111111111 a
5 110111111 8
6 100010101 4
7 011111111 8
